_description: Data security concerns per Cloud Explorer result family — encryption, access controls, classification, and data protection priorities.

access: Review shared access signatures (SAS) scope and expiry
Check for public blob/container access
Verify private endpoint usage
classification: Check for sensitive data (PII, PHI, financial) in blob containers
Review Microsoft Purview scanning coverage

encryption: Check OS and data disk encryption (ADE or host-level)
access: Review VM admin access and JIT configuration
Check for Azure Bastion usage
Verify managed identity vs connection strings
classification: VMs may process sensitive data in memory and temp storage
Check data residency compliance for VM regions

encryption: Verify TLS 1.2+ enforcement on all endpoints
Check VPN/ExpressRoute encryption for hybrid connectivity
access: Review NSG rules for data service ports (1433, 5432, 3306, 6379)
Check private endpoint coverage for data services
Verify DDoS protection on data-serving endpoints
classification: Network controls are the perimeter protecting data services
Review data flow paths through network topology

encryption: Verify credential protection (password hash sync, PTA, or federation)
access: Review privileged role assignments with data access implications
Check conditional access policies for data applications
Verify PIM activation requirements for data roles
classification: Identity is the control plane for all data access
Review service principal permissions on data resources

encryption: Verify TDE enabled on all SQL databases
access: Check for Azure AD-only authentication
Review firewall rules and private endpoint usage
Verify audit logging is enabled
classification: Use SQL sensitivity labels for column-level classification
Check Defender for SQL data discovery and classification
Review long-term backup retention for regulatory compliance

encryption: Verify CMK for AI model storage and inference data
access: Review API key vs Azure AD authentication
Check network isolation for AI endpoints
Verify content safety filters are active
classification: AI services process highly sensitive data (documents, speech, images)
Review data residency for AI processing regions

encryption: Review connection string encryption in app settings
access: Check managed identity usage vs stored credentials
Review authentication provider configuration
Verify Key Vault references for secrets
classification: Applications are the primary interface to sensitive data
Review data handling in app settings and environment variables

encryption: Review secrets management (Key Vault CSI driver vs env vars)
access: Review ACR admin account status
Check AKS RBAC configuration
Verify network policies for pod-to-pod communication
classification: Container images may embed credentials or sensitive configs
Review volume mounts for data service access

encryption: Check diagnostic data encryption in transit
access: Review workspace access control mode
Check RBAC on diagnostic settings
classification: Logs may contain sensitive data (IP addresses, usernames, query parameters)
Review data retention and purge policies

encryption: Review Defender data encryption and export settings
access: Check security admin role assignments
Review alert suppression rules
classification: Security findings reference sensitive resource configurations
Review Defender data export destinations

encryption: Review policy enforcement for encryption standards
access: Check management group access controls
Review policy exemptions
classification: Governance policies enforce data protection standards at scale
